---
title: "Session 29"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth"
date: "6 April 2026"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
LunchAmt <- c(300,154,72,899,1234,36,764,321,540,684)
TipAmt <- c(30,15,7,89,123,3,76,32,54,68)

plot(LunchAmt,
     TipAmt,
     xlab="Lunch Amount",
     ylab="Tip Amount")

reg_model <-lm(TipAmt~LunchAmt)

# plotting regression fit
abline(reg_model, col="blue")
summary(reg_model)
```

```{r}
a<-data.frame(newdata=40)
colnames(a)<-"LunchAmount"
#what is the Tip if cost of lunch is 40 INR?
predict(reg_model,a)

```

```{r}
a<-data.frame(newdata=394)
colnames(a)<-"LunchAmount"
#what is the Tip if cost of lunch is 394 INR?
predict(reg_model,a)
```

```{r}
Restaurant class
```
